SUMMARY: 
SKILLS: account management, cables/cabling, Help Desk, Linux, MS Exchange server, Sharepoint, network security, desktop support, Unix/HP Unix, VBscript, Visual Basic Programming, Windows Server, Active Directory account management/troubleshooting, group policy SCOM & SCCM, vbscripts and Powershell, SANs

SOURCE: 66832845.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: Computer Network Specialist Company Name
DATES: 07/2008 to Current
DESCRIPTION: Lan Administrator. Installed and maintain over 100 servers. Administered several systems including Exchange 2010, Lync 2013, Active Directory 2012, Proofpoint Spam filter, iBoss web filter, ArcGIS.

SOURCE: 66832845.pdf
JOB TITLE: 
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 06/2001 to 07/2008
DESCRIPTION: Installed and configured network switches. Installed and maintained Whats up network device connectivity monitoring software. Installed and supported various software including anti-virus, Office, Fortress desktop security.
